candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; appears as the main reported sales line.
Explicit revenue total; values match Revenue in the preview and can serve as alternate label across years.
Non-core other income, not top-line revenue.
Investment income, not operating revenue.

candidates.why: Ancillary income stream, not the main company top-line.
Finance income, not revenue from operations.

candidates.why: Best available direct operating cost line for a shipping company; likely analogous to cost of services/cost of sales, but selected outside the empty candidate list.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. Selected 'Shipping Related Expenses' from the full preview because it appears to be the closest direct cost / cost of services line for this shipping business. Manual review recommended to confirm it is the intended COGS equivalent rather than a broader operating expense bucket.

candidates.why: Clear overhead/personnel cost component appropriate for SG&A.
General overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A line exists.
Share-based compensation is typically part of SG&A/overhead when reported separately.
Balance sheet equity reserve, not an expense line, so not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present, so selected the best overhead components. Excluded Shipping Related Expenses (COGS-like) and Depreciation and amortization.
No dedicated research and development expense line is present in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Best single recurring financing cost line; preferable to avoid double counting with partial supplemental interest components.
Conceptually ideal, but preview shows no values and may overlap with Finance Costs if combined later.
Capitalized interest should not generally be treated as current period interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but appears to be only one part of total finance costs.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Selected the single finance-cost total to capture recurring financing costs while avoiding double counting against supplemental lease-interest detail.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income (loss) for the period / year attributable to shareholders of the Company
candidates.why: Income statement performance line, not balance sheet equity.
Best available book equity line; no separate parent-only equity line is shown.
Possible combined equity line, but values match Total Equity, suggesting no separate minority interest reported.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: Using Total Equity because no separate parent-equity line is provided. Since no distinct non-controlling interest line exists, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Could indicate combined equity including minority interest, but it is not a standalone minority-interest line and matches Total Equity values.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest / non-controlling interests row is present. 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' matches 'Total Equity', so minority interest appears absent or immaterial.
